reviews.comment:
Mala atención en la playa, no me despacharon combustible, por no tener sistema

(Translated by Google)
Poor service at the beach; they wouldn't pump fuel for me because their system was down.

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención, tanto en la playa como en el Full.
Demasiada obsesión con protocolo Covid (septiembre 2021).
En el Full no hay QR.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very slow, both on the beach and at the Full.
They were too focused on Covid protocols (September 2021). There are no QR codes at the Full.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwcjRkaRAB
